attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT DRVD.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT , DRVD.BK_SS_CD , DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD      , DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY, 
   DRVD.DEFAULT_SC_FLG AS OLD_DEFAULT_SC_FLG, 
   WI.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,  WI.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD, WI.QUOTA_FLAG,
   WI.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM, WI.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT ,WI.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT, WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT,   
   WI.EP_SK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID_INT, WI.EP_SK_SALESREP_ID_INT, WI.EP_SK_TERRITORY_ID_INT, WI.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,WI.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
   WI.EVENT_TYPE 
   /* rchettri : REBOK changes : added columns */
   ,WI.SALES_REP_NUMBER , WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY , WI.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT
   
 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV DRVD
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
  ON DRVD.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY           
  
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_TV WI
    ON ( WI.EVENT_TYPE IN ('UPDATE','DELETE')
      AND WI.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT = DRVD.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT  
	  AND WI.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT = DRVD.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT
      AND WI.SS_CD = DRVD.BK_SS_CD
     )
 WHERE 
 /* DRVD.DV_FISCAL_DT < WI.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM        */
 /* DRVD.EDW_UPDATE_DTM  <  WI.EDW_UPDATE_DTM  */
  DRVD.LAST_RECORD_FLG = 'Y'  
AND DRVD.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY=-999

SELECT 
 DRVD.DV_REVENUE_FLG      ,          
 ROW_NUMBER()  OVER( ORDER BY WI.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM ) /* + SM_MAX.MAX_TRX_SEQ_ID */ AS BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT ,
 DRVD.BK_SS_CD                      ,
 DRVD.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT * -1,
 DRVD.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT   * -1,
 DRVD.REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT      ,
 DRVD.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD              ,
 DRVD.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD            ,
 DRVD.LINE_TYPE_CD                  ,
 DRVD.SPLIT_PCT    *-1               ,  
 DRVD.GL_DTM                        ,
 DRVD.GL_POSTED_DTM                 ,
 DRVD.RULE_START_DTM                ,
 'REVERSE' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_CD  ,
 'N' AS LAST_RECORD_FLG ,
 DRVD.DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD        ,
 DRVD.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     ,
 WI.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT AS DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,
 WI.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT  AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT ,
 DRVD.REPORTING_MEASURE_TYPE        ,
 WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT,
 DRVD.SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
 DRVD.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
 DRVD.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
 DRVD.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           ,
 /* OA Q3FY14 */
 DRVD.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          ,
 DRVD.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               ,
 DRVD.AR_TRX_KEY                    ,
 DRVD.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY  ,
 DRVD.REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT  ,
 DRVD.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
 DRVD.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD          ,
 DRVD.DV_CHARGES_FLG                ,
 DRVD.DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG           ,
 DRVD.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG     ,
 DRVD.DV_MISC_FLG                   ,
 DRVD.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG       ,
 DRVD.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG             ,
 DRVD.DV_SERVICE_FLG                ,
 DRVD.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT *-1,
 DRVD.DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT *-1 ,
 DRVD.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT  *-1 ,
 DRVD.DV_EXTENDED_QTY  *-1,
 DRVD.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY    ,
 DRVD.SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG          ,
 DRVD.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM          ,
 DRVD.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  ,
 DRVD.CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM   ,
 DRVD.SHIPPED_DT                    ,
 DRVD.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD           ,
 DRVD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY ,
 DRVD.DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT ,
 DRVD.INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME         ,
 DRVD.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD        ,
 DRVD.MAJOR_LINE_FLG                ,
 DRVD.MAJOR_LINE_SALES_ORDER_LN_KEY ,
 DRVD.DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD,
 DRVD.SERVICE_TYPE_CD               ,
 DRVD.CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT        ,
 DRVD.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT  *-1,
 DRVD.GL_POSTING_CONTROL_ID_INT  ,   
 DRVD.DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD     ,  
 DRVD.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY  , 
 DRVD.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD          ,
 DRVD.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY           ,
 DRVD.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME         ,
 DRVD.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD            ,
 DRVD.BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY   ,
 USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
 USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
 DRVD.SALES_REP_NUM   ,              
 /* WI.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM       AS DV_FISCAL_DT, */
 CASE WHEN DRVD.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD ='O'  THEN DRVD.DV_FISCAL_DT ELSE WI.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM END AS DV_FISCAL_DT ,
 SUBSTR(WI.EVENT_TYPE,1,1) AS NCR_TRANSACTION_REASON_CD,
 DRVD.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY,
 DRVD.DEFAULT_SC_FLG                ,
 DRVD.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT            ,
 DRVD.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD            ,
 DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD      ,
 DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY            ,
 DRVD.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT AS OLD_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID,
 WI.EVENT_TYPE AS EVENT_TYPE ,
 DRVD.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY , 
 DRVD.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME , 
 DRVD.DV_TRX_AMT     , 
 DRVD.DV_FUNC_AMT,
 DRVD.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT,
 DRVD.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY, /*added as a part of Q3FY16 SOT OA*/
  /*added as a part of Q3FY19 ACCRUALS REVENUE*/
 DRVD.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY,
 DRVD.TSV_ACCRUALS_CD,
 DRVD.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY /*Added as part of Q2FY19 Meraki Revenue*/ 
 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV DRVD
 
 /* rchettri : commented : transaction_seq_id will be calculated while populating to DRVD table 
 INNER JOIN 
  ( select max(MAX_TRX_SEQ_ID) as MAX_TRX_SEQ_ID from 
    (
   select COALESCE(max(BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT ),0) MAX_TRX_SEQ_ID  from $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NET_CHANGE_FOR_REV WI_DRVD
   union all 
   SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG_P
   UNION ALL
   SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID ),0)    AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_P
   UNION ALL
   SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID ),0)    AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_WI_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_P
   UNION ALL
   SELECT COALESCE(MAX(BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT ),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV_P
   UNION ALL
   SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_RA_P
   UNION ALL
   SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_RT_P
   UNION ALL
   SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_RAE_P   
    ) tmp
  ) SM_MAX
 ON 1=1
 */
 
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_REV_TX_SQ_ID_NON_APLD_SC_UD WI
  ON  DRVD.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT = WI.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT
  AND DRVD.BK_SS_CD = WI.BK_SS_CD
  AND WI.EVENT_TYPE IN ('UPDATE','DELETE')

SELECT
  DRVD.DV_REVENUE_FLG      ,          
  ROW_NUMBER()  OVER( ORDER BY WI.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM ) /* + SM_MAX.MAX_TRX_SEQ_ID */ AS BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT , 
  DRVD.BK_SS_CD                      ,
  
  CASE WHEN COALESCE(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100) = 0 THEN DRVD.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT
   ELSE DRVD.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT * (  WI.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT/ COALESCE(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100)) 
  END AS GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
  
  CASE WHEN COALESCE(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100) = 0 THEN DRVD.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT
   ELSE DRVD.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT * (  WI.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT/ COALESCE(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100)) 
  END AS GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
  
  DRVD.REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT      ,
  DRVD.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD              ,
  DRVD.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD            ,
  DRVD.LINE_TYPE_CD                  ,
  WI.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT AS SPLIT_PCT,
  DRVD.GL_DTM                        ,
  DRVD.GL_POSTED_DTM                 ,
  DRVD.RULE_START_DTM                ,
  'FORWARD' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_CD  ,
  'Y' AS LAST_RECORD_FLG ,
  DRVD.DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD        ,
  DRVD.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     ,
  WI.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT AS DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT ,
  WI.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT  AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT ,
  DRVD.REPORTING_MEASURE_TYPE        ,
  WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT,
  DRVD.SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
  DRVD.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
  DRVD.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
  /* RCHETTRI : REBOK CHANGES: TAKE FROM WI_REV_TX_SQ_ID_NON_APLD_SC_UD FOR CG
  EST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  ,  
  */
 /*
  CASE WHEN DRVD.BK_SS_CD ='CG' THEN WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
   ELSE EST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
  END AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  ,  
 */
 WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  ,
   /* OA Q3FY14 */
  DRVD.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          ,
  DRVD.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               ,
  DRVD.AR_TRX_KEY                    ,
  DRVD.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY  ,
  DRVD.REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT  ,
  DRVD.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
  WI.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE AS BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE  ,
  DRVD.DV_CHARGES_FLG                ,
  DRVD.DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG           ,
  DRVD.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG     ,
  DRVD.DV_MISC_FLG                   ,
  DRVD.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG       ,
  DRVD.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG             ,
  DRVD.DV_SERVICE_FLG                ,
  
  CASE WHEN COALESCE(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100) = 0 THEN DRVD.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT 
   ELSE DRVD.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT  * (  WI.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT/ COALESCE(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100))    
  END AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
  
  CASE WHEN COALESCE(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100) = 0 THEN DRVD.DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT
   ELSE DRVD.DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT  * (  WI.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT/ COALESCE(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100)) 
  END AS DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT,
  
  CASE WHEN COALESCE(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100) = 0 THEN DRVD.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT
   ELSE DRVD.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT   * (  WI.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT/ COALESCE(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100))   
  END AS DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT ,
  
  CASE WHEN COALESCE(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100) = 0 THEN DRVD.DV_EXTENDED_QTY
   ELSE DRVD.DV_EXTENDED_QTY   * (  WI.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT/ COALESCE(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100)) 
  END AS DV_EXTENDED_QTY ,
  
  DRVD.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY    ,
  DRVD.SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG          ,
  DRVD.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM          ,
  DRVD.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  ,
  DRVD.CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM   ,
  DRVD.SHIPPED_DT                    ,
  DRVD.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD           ,
  DRVD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY ,
  DRVD.DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT ,
  DRVD.INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME         ,
  DRVD.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD        ,
  DRVD.MAJOR_LINE_FLG                ,
  DRVD.MAJOR_LINE_SALES_ORDER_LN_KEY ,
  DRVD.DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD,
  DRVD.SERVICE_TYPE_CD               ,
  DRVD.CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT        ,
  
  CASE WHEN COALESCE(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100) = 0 THEN DRVD.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT
   ELSE DRVD.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT  * (  WI.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT/ COALESCE(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100))  
  END AS DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT ,
  
  DRVD.GL_POSTING_CONTROL_ID_INT     ,
  DRVD.DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD       ,
  DRVD.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY   ,
  DRVD.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD          ,
  DRVD.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY           ,
  DRVD.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME         ,
  DRVD.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD            ,
  DRVD.BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY   ,
  USER,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
  USER,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
  /* RCHETTRI : REBOK CHANGES: TAKE FROM WI_REV_TX_SQ_ID_NON_APLD_SC_UD FOR CG
  ELSALER.SALES_REP_NUMBER   AS SALES_REP_NUM,
  */
 /* RCHETTRI:1/31/2014 :fix on duplicate Sales_rep_id/Sales_credit_type_id for CG. Pick directly from NRT table for BV/QTC/CG */
 /*
 CASE WHEN DRVD.BK_SS_CD ='CG' THEN WI.SALES_REP_NUMBER
  ELSE ELSALER.SALES_REP_NUMBER
 END AS SALES_REP_NUM,
 */
 WI.SALES_REP_NUMBER AS SALES_REP_NUM,
  /* WI.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM       AS DV_FISCAL_DT, */
  CASE WHEN DRVD.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD ='O'  THEN DRVD.DV_FISCAL_DT ELSE WI.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM END AS DV_FISCAL_DT ,
  'U' AS NCR_TRANSACTION_REASON_CD,
  DRVD.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY,
  DRVD.DEFAULT_SC_FLG AS DEFAULT_SC_FLG,
  WI.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT AS SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,
  WI.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD AS SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
  DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD      ,
  DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY            ,
  DRVD.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT,
  'UPDATE' AS EVENT_TYPE ,
  DRVD.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY , 
  DRVD.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME , 
  DRVD.DV_TRX_AMT     , 
  DRVD.DV_FUNC_AMT ,
  WI.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT AS SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT,
  DRVD.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY, /*added as a part of Q3FY16 SOT OA*/
   /*added as a part of Q3FY19 ACCRUALS REVENUE*/
 DRVD.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY,
 DRVD.TSV_ACCRUALS_CD,
  DRVD.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY /*Added as part of Q2FY19 Meraki Revenue*/  
  FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV DRVD
  
  /* rchettri : commented : transaction_seq_id will be calculated while populating to DRVD table 
  INNER JOIN 
   ( select max(MAX_TRX_SEQ_ID) as MAX_TRX_SEQ_ID from 
     (
    select COALESCE(max(BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT ),0) MAX_TRX_SEQ_ID  from $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NET_CHANGE_FOR_REV WI_DRVD
    union all
    SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG_P
    UNION ALL
    SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID ),0)    AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_P
    UNION ALL
    SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID ),0)    AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_WI_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_P
    UNION ALL
    SELECT COALESCE(MAX(BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT ),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV_P
    UNION ALL
    SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_RA_P
    UNION ALL
    SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_RT_P
    UNION ALL
    SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_RAE_P   
     ) tmp
   ) SM_MAX
  ON 1=1
  */
  
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
   ON (DRVD.BK_SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
  
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_REV_TX_SQ_ID_NON_APLD_SC_UD WI
   ON  DRVD.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT = WI.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT
   AND DRVD.BK_SS_CD = WI.BK_SS_CD
   AND WI.EVENT_TYPE ='UPDATE'
  /* RCHETTRI : REBOK CHANGES : LEFT OUTER JOIN ON EL INSTEAD OF INNER JOIN 
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_REP ELSALER
  */
  /*LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_REP ELSALER
   ON (ELSALER.SALES_REP_ID =  WI.EP_SK_SALESREP_ID_INT 
   AND ELSALER.GLOBAL_NAME =  NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
  */
   /* RCHETTRI : REBOK CHANGES : LEFT OUTER JOIN ON EL INSTEAD OF INNER JOIN 
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY EST
  */
  /*LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY EST
   ON(WI.EP_SK_TERRITORY_ID_INT = EST.TERRITORY_ID
   AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EST.GLOBAL_NAME)
   */
 /* RCHETTRI:1/31/2014 :fix on duplicate Sales_rep_id/Sales_credit_type_id for CG. Pick directly from NRT table for BV/QTC/CG  
   LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT SALES_REP_NUMBER,EP_SK_SALESREP_ID_INT,SS_CD FROM $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP_TV GROUP BY 1,2,3) ELSALER
   ON (ELSALER.EP_SK_SALESREP_ID_INT =  WI.EP_SK_SALESREP_ID_INT 
   AND ELSALER.SS_CD =  WI.BK_SS_CD) 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,EP_SK_TERRITORY_ID_INT,SS_CD FROM $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP_TV GROUP BY 1,2,3) EST
   ON(WI.EP_SK_TERRITORY_ID_INT = EST.EP_SK_TERRITORY_ID_INT
   AND WI.BK_SS_CD = EST.SS_CD)                 
 */                 
/*^^^^^^^^^^^^^*/
